mapper.select: select id, question_id, question_stem_snapshot, question_type_name_snapshot, difficulty_snapshot, item_score, display_order, updated_at from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, id asc
select count(1) from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
select coalesce(sum(item_score), 0) from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
select coalesce(max(display_order), 0) from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
